title: Credit Risk Analyst
description: Build and validate PD scorecards using WoE/IV and logistic regression in Python and SQL. Support IFRS 9 ECL calculations (PD, LGD, EAD) and credit risk reporting. 0-3 years experience. Knowledge of scorecard development and credit risk modelling required.

title: Credit Risk Analyst
description: Build and validate PD scorecards using WoE and logistic regression in Python. Support IFRS 9 ECL. Duplicate re-post of the same role.

title: Market Risk Analyst
description: Monitor market risk exposures, compute VaR and expected shortfall, run stress testing on trading portfolios. Python, SQL, fixed income and derivatives knowledge. Graduate / entry level welcome.

title: Quantitative Analyst - Risk
description: Develop quantitative models for counterparty credit risk. Python, machine learning, time series. Work with credit risk management team. Suitable for early-career quants.

title: Model Validation Analyst
description: Independent validation of PD/LGD/EAD models and scorecards. Assess discrimination (KS, Gini, AUROC), calibration and PSI stability. Python or R. Associate level.

title: Data Scientist - Risk Analytics
description: Apply machine learning (XGBoost, scikit-learn) to credit and fraud risk. Python, SQL, pandas. Build models end to end. 1-3 years experience.

title: Graduate Risk Analyst Programme 2026
description: Rotational graduate programme across credit risk, market risk and model risk. Strong quantitative background, Python or R, and interest in risk management. New graduates.

title: Biostatistician I
description: Support clinical trials with statistical analysis in R and SAS. Survival analysis, regression, real-world evidence. Entry level, MS in Biostatistics required.

title: Statistical Programmer
description: SAS and R programming for clinical and healthcare claims data. Support biostatistics team. Entry to junior level. Knowledge of survival analysis and regression a plus.

title: Fixed Income Analyst
description: Analyse credit bonds, compute yield spreads, duration and Z-spread. Fixed income and financial econometrics. Python and Excel. Associate level, 1-3 years.

title: Credit Risk Modelling Associate
description: Develop credit risk and rating models. WoE, logistic regression, IFRS 9. Python, SQL. Work with ratings team. Early career.

title: Quantitative Research Analyst
description: Quantitative research for a hedge fund. Python, statistics, machine learning, time series. Strong maths background. Analyst level.

title: Risk Data Analyst
description: Support risk management with data analysis. SQL, Python, Tableau, Excel. Build dashboards and reports. Entry level analyst.

title: Real-World Evidence Analyst
description: Analyse real-world and claims data for health outcomes. R, Python, SQL. Propensity score matching, regression. Junior RWE analyst.

title: Market Risk Quant (Graduate)
description: Graduate quant in market risk. VaR, expected shortfall, GARCH volatility, backtesting. Python. Fresh graduates in quantitative finance, statistics or mathematics.

title: Credit Analyst
description: Corporate credit analysis, financial statement analysis, credit risk assessment. Excel, some Python. Associate. 1-3 years experience.

title: Data Analyst - Business Insights
description: Business insights and analytics. SQL, Tableau, Excel, Python. Build dashboards and reports for commercial teams. Entry level.

title: Portfolio Risk Analyst
description: Quantitative and risk management for private markets portfolios. Scenario analysis, risk reporting, Python and SQL. 1-3 years in risk management.

title: Senior Credit Risk Manager
description: Lead the credit risk modelling team. 10+ years experience required. Manage a team of quants. Senior leadership role.

title: Head of Market Risk
description: Director-level role heading the market risk function. Principal responsibilities include strategy and team leadership. 15+ years.

title: PHP Web Developer
description: Build web applications in PHP and WordPress. Front-end and back-end development. Not related to data or risk.

title: Registered Nurse
description: Provide nursing care to patients. Clinical nursing role in a hospital ward.

title: Sales Executive
description: Drive sales and manage client relationships. Sales targets and business development. No quantitative work.

title: Credit Risk Analyst
description: Credit risk analysis with Python and SQL, PD scorecards and IFRS 9. This posting is stale (over three weeks old) and should be filtered out by freshness.

title: Data Scientist
description: Machine learning and Python data science role. Location not in the candidate's preferred regions and not remote.

title: Warehouse Associate
description: Warehouse operations, packing and shipping. Manual role, no analytics.
